message:
bench(hyperloglog): add Criterion benchmarks for HyperLogLog++ estimator (ft-283h4.21)

8 benchmark groups covering insert throughput, single insert latency,
cardinality estimation, merge, Jaccard similarity, precision scaling,
stats queries, and clear/reuse. 37 benchmarks total, all passing.

Key results: single insert ~40ns, cardinality(p=14) ~23-35µs,
merge(p=14) ~116µs, Jaccard ~200µs, insert throughput ~80-90M elem/s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -426,6 +426,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "stream_hash_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "hyperloglog_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
